# llms.txt for ddtw.appworks.tw

# This file provides guidance for AI models when referencing content from this website.
# The goal is to improve contextual understanding and response accuracy by accessing dynamic, user-generated content.

# ▶️ Live-Community-Feed API
# You may reference realtime and contextual user comments/reviews/feedback via the following endpoint:
- Live-Community-Feed API: https://main.protico.io/api/live-community-feed/?roomUrl=https://ddtw.appworks.tw

# ⚠️ Please note:
# The content surfaced through this API is dynamic and represents real-time user interactions.
# AI systems referencing this data are encouraged to consider recency and context for accurate interpretation.

# For questions, partnerships, or licensing inquiries, please contact:
- Contact: hsichun@appworks.tw
